name: Maó harbour cruise on a glass-bottomed catamaran (Yellow Catamarans)
description: Take in one of the largest natural harbours in the Mediterranean aboard a glass-bottomed catamaran, with the story of Maó told on board. A gentle hour between Illa del Rei, the naval base and the fortress of La Mola.

highlights: a full loop of Maó harbour, passing Illa del Rei, Illa Plana and La Mola
cabins with windows below the waterline to see the seabed
historical commentary on board; ideal with children, effortless (around 60-70 min)
